name: dokki-mcp
description: Expose Dokki's hosted MCP (facade surface) to Codex with OAuth — documents, tables, artifacts, files, search, publishing, memory, and 1000+ external integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Dokki workspace tools.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Dokki's hosted MCP facade (8 high-level tools instead of ~37 flat ones, so Codex picks the right tool and spends fewer tokens): workspace documents, tables, artifacts, file upload/download, semantic + exact search, public-site publishing with custom domains, and a `connect` tool that authorizes and runs 1000+ external integrations (GitHub, Slack, Gmail, Notion, Google Workspace, Linear, …) through Dokki. Codex uses Dokki OAuth during installation so you can choose the Personal and Org workspaces this plugin may access.
defaultPrompt: Write a Dokki doc and publish it to our docs site.
Pull my open GitHub issues into a Dokki table.
